pendulum_behavior_fallback_repairs.description: A support-gated behavior fallback must improve true return over unsupported high-candidate raw selection.

pendulum_fallback_reduces_dynamics_misma.description: The fallback must reduce selected token/simulator dynamics mismatch.

pendulum_oracle_gap_visible.description: The candidate pool must contain better action sequences than raw reward-token selection chooses.

pendulum_raw_reward_extremizes.description: On Gymnasium Pendulum-v1, increasing raw candidate count to 64 must strongly increase decoded reward-token return.

pendulum_raw_true_return_not_improved.description: The same high-candidate raw selection must not translate into better true Pendulum return.

pendulum_raw_worse_than_behavior.description: High-candidate raw reward-token selection must underperform a behavior-policy baseline.
